headline: ADP Marketplace Launches AI Agents to Help Make Work Easier, Smarter
summary: ADP® today announced the launch of a new destination within ADP Marketplace, the world's largest digital HR storefront, designed to help organizations discover and deploy AI agents that seamlessly integrate with ADP and accelerate work across the entire employee lifecycle. This growing ecosystem of AI solutions empowers HR teams, managers, and employees with simple solutions that make work easier.

headline: ADP Earnings Beat And Guidance Raise Contrast With Share Price Weakness
summary: Automatic Data Processing (NasdaqGS:ADP) reported Q2 2026 earnings above expectations. The company raised its fiscal year guidance following the Q2 2026 results. Revenue grew in both of ADP’s major business segments, underscoring its position in cloud-based Human Capital Management. Automatic Data Processing (NasdaqGS:ADP), trading at $214.36, is coming off a weak stretch for shareholders, with the stock down 13.2% over the past month, 15.2% year to date, and 30.5% over the past year...

headline: Reassessing Automatic Data Processing (ADP) After A 30% One-Year Share Price Slide
summary: If you are wondering whether Automatic Data Processing (ADP) still justifies its current share price, this article will walk through how its valuation stacks up using several common methods. ADP last closed at US$214.36, with returns of 0.1% over 7 days, a 13.2% decline over 30 days, a 15.2% decline year to date, a 30.5% decline over 1 year, 1.9% over 3 years and 33.4% over 5 years. These changes may have shifted how the market views its potential and risk. Recent news coverage around ADP...

headline: Assessing ADP (ADP) Valuation After Earnings Beat Guidance Hike And Fresh Concerns Over PEO And AI
summary: Automatic Data Processing (ADP) recently reported Q2 fiscal 2026 results that beat earnings and revenue expectations and raised its full year outlook, yet the stock fell as investors focused on softer PEO growth. See our latest analysis for Automatic Data Processing. At a share price of $214.36, the stock has seen a 13.15% 1 month share price decline and a 16.21% 3 month share price decline. The 5 year total shareholder return of 33.40% points to a much steadier long run outcome despite...
